description_long: This wall-mounted sconce features an industrial design with a black metal bracket and a visible twisted rope-style electrical cord. The cord is looped and draped over the bracket, adding a rustic and utilitarian aesthetic. A single exposed bulb with visible filaments hangs from the end of the cord, encased in a simple black socket. The bracket is constructed from sturdy metal rods with subtle decorative curves, providing both support and visual interest. The mounting plate and cord anchor are also black, complementing the overall color scheme. The design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban exteriors or interiors with an industrial or vintage theme.
description: A black metal wall sconce with a twisted rope cord and an exposed filament bulb, featuring industrial and rustic design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bulb, socket, and the rope cord looped over the bracket, with the mounting plate partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the bracket, the draped cord, and the bulb hanging down, with the mounting plate and cord anchor clearly visible.
description_view_2: Edge-on view showing the sconce's narrow profile, with the cord and bulb mostly hidden behind the bracket.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the bracket's structure, the looping cord, and the bulb, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial and rustic with a visible rope cord, exposed bulb, and black metal bracket featuring subtle decorative curves.
